title: Bare Bones x RPG Series
description: A retexture of the RPG Series collection of mods to fit with the Bare Bones resource pack.
body:
This resource pack is a retexture of a collection of mod called the RPG Series to better fit into the style of the Bare Bones resource pack.
<details>
<summary>Currently supported mods:</summary>

- [Runes](https://modrinth.com/mod/runes)
- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine)
- [Wizards](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)
- [Jewelry](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry)
</details>
